title: Bramhatal Trek
description: A winter trek to the frozen Bramhatal lake in the Garhwal Himalayas — rhododendron forests, knee-deep snow, and Mt Trishul looming overhead.
coverAlt: Snow-covered trail through rhododendron forest on the way to Bramhatal lake

images.alt: Trail through rhododendron forest on Day 1 from Lohajung
images.caption: Day 1 — Lohajung to Bekaltal

images.alt: Valley views through the forest canopy
Sunlight filtering through the rhododendron trees
First glimpses of Himalayan peaks above the treeline
Approach to Bekaltal campsite
Snow on the trail as altitude increases
Morning light on the snow-dusted forest
Climbing higher on Day 2 toward Bramhatal base
images.caption: Day 2 — Bekaltal to Bramhatal Base

images.alt: Trail winding through deep snow
Panoramic view of the Garhwal Himalayas
Mt Trishul massif appearing through a break in the trees
Snow-covered Himalayan peaks against a blue sky
images.caption: Day 3 — Summit Day

images.alt: Sunrise on the peaks above Bramhatal base camp
Final approach through knee-deep snow to the lake
Looking back at the climb from the lake approach
Bramhatal Lake completely frozen at 12,250 feet
images.caption: Bramhatal Lake at 3,592m

images.alt: Standing at the edge of the frozen alpine lake
Panoramic view of Bramhatal lake with surrounding peaks
Descending from the lake in afternoon light
Mt Trishul towering over the snowfield
images.caption: Mt Trishul (7,120m)

images.alt: Last views of the Garhwal peaks before descending
